title: The magic behind GenLatte: Flutter, Firebase, and Gemini
summary: GenLatte is an innovative demo application showcased at Google Cloud Next '26 that uses Flutter and Firebase to build a generative UI app powered by Gemini. The application generates dynamic, on-demand user images tailored to customer preferences for printing personalized art on lattes, demonstrating agentic development and Agent-to-UI (A2UI) capabilities for real-time co-creation of personalized experiences.
writeup: This video walks through GenLatte, a demo application built with Flutter and Firebase that uses Gemini to generate dynamic, personalized images on demand for latte art printing. It covers how agentic features and Agent-to-UI (A2UI) drive real-time co-creation of tailored customer experiences. The discussion grounds the build in concepts including UI design, agentic loops, agent orchestration, and test-time compute.
